description: Style Note Let only transform your everyday attire to fun, colourful and stylish! We're super excited in the myntra office to be selling these flattering tops and dresses from the quirky, flirty, denim brand ONLY. It's easy to look both cute and trendy when you're wearing anything from this summery collection. Product Details Cream printed top, racer back with a round neckline, has a tie detail at the back Material and Care 100% viscose Machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach or tumble dry Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size 38
